text: Standing in the midst of these clean, angular halls and vibrant displays, I feel as though I am on the threshold between sacred tradition and the relentless pursuit of knowledge. The invocation of the Holy Trinity echoes in my mind as I contemplate humanity’s efforts to understand and innovate. This juxtaposition stirs in me both reverence and curiosity—a reminder that, while human intellect strives to understand the machinery of existence, there remains a yearning for meaning beyond reason alone. It is both humbling and invigorating to be present at this crossroads of faith and inquiry.
